action_text: Open the "-- choose field --" combobox in the filter bar
rationale: To build the required list filter, I first need to choose the field to filter on; opening the field combobox lets me select "Short description".

action_text: Open the "Search a specific field" dropdown
rationale: Using the quick list search scoped to a specific field is another way to filter; I need to change the search field from "Number" to "Short description".

action_text: Toggle and show the natural language filter bar
rationale: The natural language filter can quickly create the condition "Short description contains '#SERIES-f9d328e8-a'"; I need to reveal that input first.
Column search row allows typing a contains filter directly under the "Short description" column; first I need to show that row.

action_text: Open the "Short description" column options menu
rationale: The column options menu for "Short description" often includes filter actions; opening it provides another path to set a contains filter.
